SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.
This fixture includes commentary lines between courses, a parenthetical, and
a unit-mismatch course that should be reported as unparsed.

Part of the Southeast Quarter of Section 4, Township 17 North, Range 4 East,
Hamilton County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence North 20 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 300.00 feet (along an
old fence);
thence approximately due south along a meandering creek for several rods to a
witness post (this course is intentionally unparsable);
thence South 70 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence South 20 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 300.00 feet;
thence North 70 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 200.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
